label: Generic — lead intent signals, no CTA click

output.inferred_need: A safer step before filling a form — clarity on what happens next
output.message_angle: Mirror the intent on the page (quote, demo, consult) with a lighter first step
output.offer_type: Micro-conversion: callback request, shorter form, calendar link, or downloadable proof
output.surface: Sticky footer CTA copy test, inline form step-down, or chat prompt
output.timing: After scroll depth shows they read the value prop
output.recommended_activation_summary: Page shows a hard conversion ask and the visitor is engaged, but they have not clicked — offer a lower-commitment path (shorter form, callback, calendar, or proof asset) that matches the same intent.
